name: Worg

traits.name: Resistances
traits.text: Acid, Bludgeoning, Cold, Fire, Piercing, Slashing

traits.name: Immunities
traits.text: Necrotic, Poison; Charmed, Exhaustion, Grappled, Paralyzed, Petrified, Poisoned, Prone, Restrained, Unconscious

traits.name: Incorporeal Movement
traits.text: The wraith can move through other creatures and objects as if they were Difficult Terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) Force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

traits.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
traits.text: While in sunlight, the wraith has Disadvantage on ability checks and attack rolls.

text:
# Worg

*Medium or Small Undead, Neutral Evil*

### Actions

**Life Drain.** Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. Hit: 21 (4d8 + 3) Necrotic damage. If the target is a creature, its Hit Point maximum decreases by an amount equal to the damage taken.
